Metadata.title: PAY by square Generator - Free QR Code for Slovak & Czech Bank Payments
Metadata.description: Free online PAY by square QR code generator. Create payment QR codes for Slovak and Czech banks instantly. Also supports EPC QR and SPAYD. No registration.
Metadata.ogDescription: Generate PAY by square QR codes for free. Create payment QR codes for Slovak and Czech banks. Custom colors, logo, and text. Also supports EPC QR and SPAYD.
Metadata.twitterDescription: Free PAY by square QR code generator for Slovak and Czech bank payments. Also supports EPC QR & SPAYD.
Metadata.keywords: QR code, payment, bank transfer, BySquare, PAY by square, EPC QR, SEPA, IBAN, Slovakia, Czech, QR code generator, Slovak banks, Czech banks, payment QR code, free, online payment, SPAYD, CZK
Metadata.bulkTitle: Bulk QR Code Generation for Payments
Metadata.bulkDescription: Bulk QR code generation for bank transfers from a CSV file. Download as ZIP or PDF.
Metadata.privacyDescription: Information about personal data processing in QR Payments.
Metadata.termsDescription: Terms of use for the QR Payments application.
Metadata.faqDescription: Answers to the most common questions about the QR code payment generator.
Metadata.homeH1: Free QR Code Generator for Slovak & Czech Bank Payments
Metadata.homeDescription: Create a payment QR code for free - just enter the IBAN, amount, and symbols. We support PAY by square for Slovak banks, SPAYD for Czech banks, and EPC QR for international SEPA transfers.
Metadata.sectionApi: REST API for QR Code Generation
Metadata.webApiDescription: REST API for generating QR codes for Slovak and Czech bank payments in BySquare, EPC, and SPAYD formats. Free, no authentication required.
Metadata.apiDocsDescription: Complete REST API documentation for generating PAY by square and SPAYD QR codes for Slovak and Czech bank payments. Free, no authentication required.
Metadata.studioTitle: QR Studio - Advanced QR Code Editor
Metadata.studioDescription: Design a QR code with gradients, custom logo, frame, caption, and overlay positioning. Fully offline, no signup.
Metadata.changelogDescription: Chronological log of new features, improvements, and API changes in QR Platby. Stay up to date with the latest releases.

Footer.privacy: We don't need your data. Everything is stored in your browser and never leaves it.

Announcement.message: What's new: gradients, logo, frame, position picker, image size from 128 to 1024 px - and the REST API now supports custom colors, margin, and error correction level.

Changelog.subtitle: What's new, improved, and changed in QR Platby - newest first.

Consent.message: This site uses localStorage to save your settings. We don't collect cookies or personal data.

Validation.recipientRequired: Recipient name is required for EPC QR
Validation.epcMaxAmount: Max amount for EPC QR is 999,999,999.99 €

QRPreview.title: QR Code
QRPreview.regenerateFailed: Failed to regenerate QR code. Try changing the settings.

downloadSize.label: Size
downloadSize.help: Small (128px) for screens, Standard (256px) for general use, Document (512px) for invoices, Print (1024px) for physical printing.

History.title: History
History.clearHistoryDescription: This action cannot be undone. All saved payments will be removed.
History.deleteRecordDescription: This action cannot be undone. The record will be removed from history.

Branding.warning: Customizations may affect QR code readability. Test before use.
Branding.logoHelp: Logo replaces the center text of the QR code
Branding.logoTooLarge: Image after compression to 64×64px exceeded 10 KB. Try a simpler or smaller image.
Branding.logoUploadError: Error uploading logo. Please try again.

guardrail.logoOversized: Logo is {size}% of the QR area. The safe maximum at error correction {ecc} is {max}%. Reduce the size to keep the code scannable.
guardrail.textOversized: Center text is too large and covers more than {max}% of the QR. Shorten it, lower the size, or split fewer lines so the code stays scannable.
guardrail.lowContrast: Contrast between foreground and background is low. Pick stronger colors for reliable scanning.
guardrail.veryLowContrast: Contrast is too low - the QR may not scan. Increase contrast or pick different colors.
guardrail.weakGradientFg: Foreground gradient stops are too close together and will render almost flat. Use colors with more separation.
guardrail.weakGradientBg: Background gradient stops are too close together and will render almost flat. Use colors with more separation.

Studio.title: QR Studio
Studio.intro: Advanced editor for designing QR codes with gradients, logo, frame, and precise overlay positioning. Everything runs in your browser.
Studio.frameEnabled: Add a frame around the QR code
Studio.offCenterWarning: Off-center logo or text may affect scanability. Always test before sharing.

scanBadge.tooltipOk: Decoded text matches the source payload
scanBadge.tooltipMismatch: Decoded text doesn't match. Reduce logo size, raise contrast, or simplify gradients.
scanBadge.tooltipDecodeFailed: Couldn't decode the QR. Reduce logo size or raise contrast.

Bulk.title: Bulk QR Code Generation
Bulk.description: Upload a CSV file with payment details and generate QR codes at once.
Bulk.uploadDescription: Drag a file here or click to browse
Bulk.generationErrors: {count, plural, one {Error generating QR code} other {Errors generating {count} QR codes}}

Error.title: Something went wrong
Error.defaultMessage: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: This page doesn't exist or has been moved.

Offline.title: You're offline
Offline.description: This page is not available offline. Check your internet connection and try again.

ShareLink.title: Share payment via link
ShareLink.description: The link contains IBAN, amount, recipient name, payment symbols, note, and QR code appearance.
ShareLink.logoNotice: The logo won't appear in the shared link. The recipient's QR code will be displayed without it.
ShareLink.hint: The recipient will see a page with the QR code, which they can scan using their banking app.

Api.title: API Available
Api.description: Integrate QR code generation into your app, chatbot, or workflow. Free, no API key required.
Api.prompt: First GET https://qr-platby.com/api/v1/qr to read the API docs, then generate a PAY by square QR code for 25€ to IBAN SK3112000000198742637541
Api.promptAlt: Generate a Czech SPAYD QR code for 500 CZK to IBAN CZ5508000000001234567899 with variable symbol 1234567890
Api.mcpNote: Also available as a ChatGPT Custom GPT and Claude MCP server.

Docs.title: API Documentation
Docs.subtitle: Generate PAY by square and SPAYD QR codes via REST API
Docs.quickStartDesc: Generate a Slovak PAY by square QR code with a single POST request:
Docs.quickStartSpayd: Or generate a Czech SPAYD QR code:
Docs.parametersDesc: Send a JSON body with the following parameters to the POST endpoint:
Docs.errorValidation: Invalid or missing request parameters. Check the issues array for field-specific errors.
Docs.errorJson: Request body is not valid JSON. Ensure you send proper JSON with Content-Type: application/json.
Docs.errorIban: IBAN failed validation. Must start with a 2-letter country code followed by 2 check digits.
Docs.errorSpayd: SPAYD payload too large. Reduce the length of paymentNote or recipientName.
Docs.errorRateLimit: Too many requests. Respect the Retry-After header and implement exponential backoff.
Docs.errorInternal: Unexpected server error. Try again later or contact support.
Docs.rateLimitGetNote: and OPTIONS endpoints are not rate-limited
Docs.rateLimitTip: Implement exponential backoff when you receive a 429 response. Cache QR codes on your side when possible.
Docs.tryItDesc: Send a real request to the API and see the response:
Docs.epcNote: EPC QR (European SEPA) is available in the web app but not yet via the API.

Feedback.title: Suggest a feature
Feedback.description: Have an idea for improvement? Let us know.
Feedback.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters
Feedback.messageMax: Message can be at most 500 characters
Feedback.maxReached: You have sent the maximum number of suggestions.
Feedback.ctaDescription: Got an idea for improvement? Let us know.

dataCollection.heading: What data we collect
dataCollection.body: None. QR Platby does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data to a server. All payment details (IBAN, amount, symbols) are processed exclusively in your browser.

localStorage.heading: Local storage (localStorage)
localStorage.body1: The application uses your browser's localStorage to save payment history and settings. This data never leaves your browser and is not accessible to us or third parties.
localStorage.body2: You can delete the data at any time using the "Clear history" button in the app or through your browser settings.

analytics.heading: Analytics
analytics.body: We use <link>Vercel Web Analytics</link>, which collects anonymous traffic data (page views, country). It does not use cookies and does not identify individual users.

cookies.heading: Cookies and tracking
cookies.body: The application does not use cookies. We do not use any advertising, tracking, or third-party marketing tools.

about.heading: About the service
about.body: QR Platby is a free online tool for generating QR codes for bank payments in BySquare, EPC, and SPAYD (QR Platba) formats. The service is provided "as-is", without any warranties.

responsibility.heading: Responsibility
responsibility.body: The operator is not responsible for errors in generated QR codes or for payment issues. Users are required to verify the accuracy of data in the QR code before use.

compatibility.heading: Compatibility
compatibility.body: QR codes are generated according to BySquare, EPC, and SPAYD standards, but we do not guarantee compatibility with all banking applications.

changes.heading: Service changes
changes.body: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the service at any time without prior notice.

sourceCode.heading: Source code
sourceCode.body: The application's source code is publicly available on <link>GitHub</link>.
